mapper.select:
/* oms-po-UrgencyPoPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderUrgencyPoPlanReq */ #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT '0' AS CHK , F.REQORDERSTATUS , (SELECT COMDTNM FROM TORDER_MST_COM_DT DT WHERE DT.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND DT.COMHDKEY = 'POSTATUS' AND DT.INSERTSYSTM = 'OMS' AND DT.COMDTKEY = F.REQORDERSTATUS AND DT.LAKEY = 'KOR') AS REQORDERSTATUSNM , F.ABLEREQORDERYN , F.URGENCYREQORDERYN , COALESCE(F.REQORDERDAY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd')) AS REQORDERDAY , F.SEQ , F.CTKEY , F.OWKEY , F.REQCTKEY , F.CTNM AS REQCTNM -- 상품정보 , F.ICKEY , F.ICNM , F.ASRTNM , F.LCKEY AS ICTGT , F.UNICYN , F.ICEA , F.ICINN , F.ICCTN , F.ICCPP , F.ICPLT
-- 발주구역 , CASE WHEN F.ASRTYN ='Y' THEN 'T' WHEN F.REQCTKEY ='05'THEN F.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG WHEN F.REQCTKEY ='04'THEN F.BUSANB2BPOCTG WHEN F.REQCTKEY ='01'THEN F.NAMSAB2BPOCTG ELSE F.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG END AS REQORDERAR
, F.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG , F.NAMSAB2BPOCTG , F.BUSANB2BPOCTG
-- B2B 센터 입고 예정정보 , F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY , F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY , F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY
-- B2B 센터 재고 , F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY AS NAMSAAVQTY , F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY AS BUSANAVQTY , F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY AS ANSUNGAVQTY
-- B2B 일 평균 출고량 , F.NAMSAAVGOBQTY , F.BUSANAVGOBQTY , F.ANSUNGAVGOBQTY
-- B2B 센터 보장재고 , F.NAMSAB2BCTGRTDAYS * F.NAMSAAVGOBQTY AS NAMSAB2BCTGRTQTY , F.BUSANB2BCTGRTDAYS * F.BUSANAVGOBQTY AS BUSANB2BCTGRTQTY , F.ANSUNGB2BCTGRTDAYS * F.ANSUNGAVGOBQTY AS ANSUNGB2BCTGRTQTY
-- 발주 가용일 산정 , F.CTLEADTIME , F.AVDAYS
-- B2B센터 재고 + B2B입고예정정보 : B2B재고수량 -- 센터재고 : TO-BE : B2B재고수량 – (보장재고일수 * 오프라인일 평균수량 )) , F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY AS ANSUNGIVRFLCTNEEDQTYEA --안성 센터 재고(낱개) , F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY AS NAMSAIVRFLCTNEEDQTYEA --남사 센터 재고(낱개) , F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY AS BUSANIVRFLCTNEEDQTYEA --부산 센터 재고(낱개) -- INN , ROUND((F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICINN, 0),0) , 2) AS ANSUNGIVRFLCTNEEDQTYINN --안성 센터 재고(중포) , ROUND((F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICINN, 0),0) , 2) AS NAMSAIVRFLCTNEEDQTYINN --남사 센터 재고(중포) , ROUND((F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICINN, 0),0) , 2) AS BUSANIVRFLCTNEEDQTYINN --부산 센터 재고(중포) -- CTN , ROUND((F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) , 2) AS ANSUNGIVRFLCTNEEDQTYCTN --안성 센터 재고(CTN) , ROUND((F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) , 2) AS NAMSAIVRFLCTNEEDQTYCTN --남사 센터 재고(CTN) , ROUND((F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) , 2) AS BUSANIVRFLCTNEEDQTYCTN --부산 센터 재고(CTN) -- PLT , ROUND((F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ANSUNGCPP, 0),0), 2) AS ANSUNGIVRFLCTNEEDQTYPLT --안성 센터 재고(PLT) , ROUND((F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(NAMSACPP, 0),0) , 2) AS NAMSAIVRFLCTNEEDQTYPLT --남사 센터 재고(PLT) , ROUND((F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(BUSANCPP, 0),0) , 2) AS BUSANIVRFLCTNEEDQTYPLT --부산 센터 재고(PLT)
, COALESCE(ANSUNGCPP, 0) ANSUNGCPP -- 안성센터 CPP , COALESCE(NAMSACPP, 0) NAMSACPP -- 남사센터 CPP , COALESCE(BUSANCPP, 0) BUSANCPP -- 부산센터 CPP
-- 발주 요청 , F.REQORDERUNIT -- 발주단위 , F.DLVYREQORDERUNIT -- 배송용기단위 , CASE WHEN F.DLVYREQORDERUNIT = 'INN' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICINN, 0),0), 2) WHEN F.DLVYREQORDERUNIT = 'CTN' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) , 2) WHEN F.DLVYREQORDERUNIT = 'PLT' THEN CASE WHEN F.REQCTKEY = '05' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ANSUNGCPP, 0),0), 2) WHEN F.REQCTKEY = '01' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(NAMSACPP, 0),0) , 2) WHEN F.REQCTKEY = '04' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(BUSANCPP, 0),0) , 2) ELSE ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCPP, 0),0) , 2) END ELSE F.REQORDERQTY END AS REQORDERUTQTY , F.REQORDERQTY -- 발주요청수량 , F.REQORDERTYPE , ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICINN, 0),0), 2) AS REQORDERINN , ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) , 2) AS REQORDERCTN , CASE WHEN F.REQCTKEY = '05' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ANSUNGCPP, 0),0), 2) WHEN F.REQCTKEY = '01' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(NAMSACPP, 0),0) , 2) WHEN F.REQCTKEY = '04' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(BUSANCPP, 0),0) , 2) ELSE ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCPP, 0),0) , 2) END AS REQORDERPLT , F.REQORDEREXCEPTYN -- 요청 CBM , F.REQCBM , F.REQPRC , F.VOL , F.SLPRC , F.OBFROMDAY AS AVGOBFROMDAY , F.OBTODAY AS AVGOBTODAY , F.APLYDAYS AS AVGAPLYDAYS , F.REQORDERUNITCTN , F.REQORDERUNITPLT , F.REQORDERUNITINN , F.NISYN , F.NISQTY , F.INSERTDATE , F.INSERTURKEY , F.UPDATEDATE , F.UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT RE.REQORDERSTATUS AS REQORDERSTATUS , COALESCE(RE.ABLEREQORDERYN, I.POABLEYN) AS ABLEREQORDERYN , 'Y' AS URGENCYREQORDERYN , COALESCE(RE.SEQ, -999) AS SEQ , IC.CTKEY , I.OWKEY , (SELECT CTNM FROM TORDER_MST_CT WHERE CTKEY = COALESCE(RE.REQCTKEY, '05')) AS CTNM -- 상품정보 , I.ICKEY , I.ICNM , I.ASRTYN , I.UNICYN , CASE I.ASRTYN WHEN 'Y' THEN '아소트' ELSE '일반' END AS ASRTNM , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_EA, 1) AS ICEA , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_INN, 1) AS ICINN , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_CTN, 1) AS ICCTN , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_CPP, 1) AS ICCPP , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_CTN, 1) * COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_CPP, 1) AS ICPLT , IC.LCKEY -- 발주구역 , LC.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG , LC.NAMSAB2BPOCTG , LC.BUSANB2BPOCTG
, CASE WHEN B2B_REQORDER.NAMSA_IBEXPCTDAY >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') THEN B2B_REQORDER.NAMSA_IBEXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END AS NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY , CASE WHEN B2B_REQORDER.BUSAN_IBEXPCTDAY >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') THEN B2B_REQORDER.BUSAN_IBEXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END AS BUSANIBEXPCTQTY , CASE WHEN B2B_REQORDER.ANSUNG_IBEXPCTDAY >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') THEN B2B_REQORDER.ANSUNG_IBEXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY
-- B2B 센터 재고 , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.NAMSA_AVQTY, 0) AS NAMSAAVQTY , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.BUSAN_AVQTY, 0) AS BUSANAVQTY , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.ANSUNG_AVQTY, 0) AS ANSUNGAVQTY -- B2B 일 평균 출고량 , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.NAMSA_AVGOBQTY, 0) AS NAMSAAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.BUSAN_AVGOBQTY, 0) AS BUSANAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.ANSUNG_AVGOBQTY, 0) AS ANSUNGAVGOBQTY -- B2B 센터 보장재고 , COALESCE(GRTDAYS.NAMSA_B2BCTGRTDAYS, 1) AS NAMSAB2BCTGRTDAYS -- 남사 보장재고일수 , COALESCE(GRTDAYS.BUSAN_B2BCTGRTDAYS, 1) AS BUSANB2BCTGRTDAYS -- 부산 보장재고일수 , COALESCE(GRTDAYS.ANSUNG_B2BCTGRTDAYS, 1) AS ANSUNGB2BCTGRTDAYS -- 안성 보장재고일수 -- 발주 가용일 산정 , COALESCE(RE.REQCTKEY, '05') AS REQCTKEY , COALESCE(RE.CTLEADTIME, CT.CTLEADTIME) AS CTLEADTIME , COALESCE(RE.AVDAYS, RO.NEEDDAYS) AS AVDAYS
-- 요청 CBM , ICUT.VOL * RE.REQORDERQTY AS REQCBM , I.SLPRC * RE.REQORDERQTY AS REQPRC , ICUT.VOL AS VOL , I.SLPRC AS SLPRC -- 로케이션 CAPA 정보 : 한번더 확인 필요
--발주요청 데이터 , RE.REQORDERUNIT -- 발주단위 , RE.DLVYREQORDERUNIT -- 배송용기단위 , RE.REQORDERQTY -- 발주요청수량 , RE.REQORDERDAY , COALESCE(RE.REQORDERTYPE, COALESCE(RO.REQORDERTYPE, 03)) AS REQORDERTYPE -- 03 : 이고발주 , COALESCE(RE.REQORDEREXCEPTYN, 'N') AS REQORDEREXCEPTYN , COALESCE(B2C_OB.NISYN, 'N') AS NISYN , COALESCE(B2C_OB.NISQTY, 0) AS NISQTY , OBAVG.OBFROMDAY , OBAVG.OBTODAY , OBAVG.APLYDAYS , CNTRUNIT.REQORDERUNITCTN , CNTRUNIT.REQORDERUNITPLT , CNTRUNIT.REQORDERUNITINN , CTCPP.NAMSA_CPP AS NAMSACPP , CTCPP.BUSAN_CPP AS BUSANCPP , CTCPP.ANSUNG_CPP AS ANSUNGCPP , RE.INSERTDATE , RE.INSERTURKEY , RE.UPDATEDATE , RE.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_MST_IC I INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON I.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = ICUT.ICKEY AND ICUNITTYPE = 'EA' INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ICXCT IC ON I.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT CT ON IC.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY INNER JOIN ( SELECT ICKEY , OWKEY , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'EA' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 1) AS IC_EA , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'INN' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 1) AS IC_INN , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'CTN' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 1) AS IC_CTN , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'CTN' THEN CASE CPP WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE CPP END END), 1) AS IC_CPP FROM TORDER_MST_ICUTXTYPE WHERE OWKEY = 'DAISO' GROUP BY ICKEY, OWKEY ) S_ICUT ON I.OWKEY = S_ICUT.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = S_ICUT.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_REQORDER RO ON IC.OWKEY = RO.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = RO.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RO.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.ICKEY -- AVQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.AVQTY END) AS NAMSA_AVQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.AVQTY END) AS BUSAN_AVQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.AVQTY END) AS ANSUNG_AVQTY
-- PREIBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.PREIBQTY END) AS NAMSA_PREIBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.PREIBQTY END) AS BUSAN_PREIBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.PREIBQTY END) AS ANSUNG_PREIBQTY
-- IBEXPCTDAY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.IBEXPCTDAY END) AS NAMSA_IBEXPCTDAY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.IBEXPCTDAY END) AS BUSAN_IBEXPCTDAY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.IBEXPCTDAY END) AS ANSUNG_IBEXPCTDAY
-- IBEXPCTQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.IBEXPCTQTY END) AS NAMSA_IBEXPCTQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.IBEXPCTQTY END) AS BUSAN_IBEXPCTQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.IBEXPCTQTY END) AS ANSUNG_IBEXPCTQTY
-- AVGOBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.AVGOBQTY END) AS NAMSA_AVGOBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.AVGOBQTY END) AS BUSAN_AVGOBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.AVGOBQTY END) AS ANSUNG_AVGOBQTY
FROM TORDER_INFO_B2BAVGOBQTY_REQORDER A INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY WHERE A.CRITDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY A.ICKEY ORDER BY A.ICKEY
) B2B_REQORDER ON I.ICKEY = B2B_REQORDER.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT #{CTKEY} AS CTKEY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN GRTIVDAYS END) AS NAMSA_B2BCTGRTDAYS , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN GRTIVDAYS END) AS BUSAN_B2BCTGRTDAYS , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN GRTIVDAYS END) AS ANSUNG_B2BCTGRTDAYS FROM TORDER_MST_CT A )GRTDAYS ON IC.CTKEY = GRTDAYS.CTKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY, SUM(COALESCE(EXPCTQTY, 0)) AS B2C_IB_QTY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT D ON H.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND H.SOHDKEY = D.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE O ON H.OWKEY = O.OWKEY AND H.ORDERTYPECD = O.ORDERTYPECD WHERE O.POCALINCYN = 'Y' AND H.DLVYEXPCTDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY ) B2C_IB ON IC.OWKEY = B2C_IB.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = B2C_IB.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY, D.URGENCYREQYN AS NISYN, SUM(D.NISQTY) AS NISQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT D ON H.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND H.SOHDKEY = D.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE O ON H.OWKEY = O.OWKEY AND H.ORDERTYPECD = O.ORDERTYPECD WHERE O.OBYN = 'Y' AND D.URGENCYREQYN = 'Y' AND D.URGENCYREQPRCSSEQ IS NULL AND H.DLVYEXPCTDAY >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY, D.URGENCYREQYN ) B2C_OB ON IC.OWKEY = B2C_OB.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = B2C_OB.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDERIV RIV ON IC.OWKEY = RIV.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = RIV.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RIV.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDER RE ON IC.OWKEY = RE.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = RE.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RE.ICKEY AND RE.REQORDERDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') AND RE.URGENCYREQORDERYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_LC LC ON IC.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND IC.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_OBAVGQTY OBAVG ON IC.OWKEY = OBAVG.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = OBAVG.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = OBAVG.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY , CTKEY , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN REQORDERUNIT = 'CTN' THEN CRITSET END), 0) AS REQORDERUNITCTN , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN REQORDERUNIT = 'PLT' THEN CRITSET END), 0) AS REQORDERUNITPLT , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN REQORDERUNIT = 'INN' THEN CRITSET END), 0) AS REQORDERUNITINN FROM TORDER_MST_REQORDER_CNTRUNIT WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY OWKEY, CTKEY ) CNTRUNIT ON IC.OWKEY = CNTRUNIT.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = CNTRUNIT.CTKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.ICKEY , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN CPP END), 1) AS NAMSA_CPP , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN CPP END), 1) AS BUSAN_CPP , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN CPP END), 1) AS ANSUNG_CPP FROM TORDER_MST_ICXB2BCPP A GROUP BY A.ICKEY ) CTCPP ON IC.ICKEY = CTCPP.ICKEY WHERE I.POABLEYN = 'Y' AND RO.REQORDERTYPE = '03'
AND I.OWKEY = #{OWKEY}
AND IC.CTKEY = #{CTKEY}
AND IC.ICKEY IN
#{item}
AND RE.REQORDEREXCEPTYN = #{REQORDEREXCEPTYN}
) F WHERE 1 = 1
AND F.NISYN = #{NISYN}
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY F.UPDATEDATE DESC NULLS LAST, F.ICKEY ASC
#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}

/* oms-po-UrgencyPoPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderNisSoList */ SELECT H.OWKEY, H.SOHDKEY, D.SODTKEY, D.ICKEY, D.URGENCYREQYN FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT D ON H.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND H.SOHDKEY = D.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE O ON H.OWKEY = O.OWKEY AND H.ORDERTYPECD = O.ORDERTYPECD WHERE O.OBYN = 'Y' AND D.URGENCYREQYN = 'Y' AND D.URGENCYREQPRCSSEQ IS NULL AND H.DLVYEXPCTDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd')

/* oms-po-UrgencyPoPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderUrgencyPoPlanReqIcSearch */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , F.REQORDERSTATUS , (SELECT COMDTNM FROM TORDER_MST_COM_DT DT WHERE DT.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND DT.COMHDKEY = 'POSTATUS' AND DT.INSERTSYSTM = 'OMS' AND DT.COMDTKEY = F.REQORDERSTATUS AND DT.LAKEY = 'KOR') AS REQORDERSTATUSNM , F.ABLEREQORDERYN , F.URGENCYREQORDERYN , COALESCE(F.REQORDERDAY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd')) AS REQORDERDAY , F.SEQ , F.OWKEY , F.REQCTKEY , F.CTNM AS REQCTNM -- 상품정보 , F.ICKEY , F.ICNM , F.ASRTYN , F.LCKEY AS ICTGT , F.UNICYN , F.ICEA , F.ICINN , F.ICCTN , F.ICCPP , F.ICPLT
-- 발주구역 , F.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG , F.NAMSAB2BPOCTG , F.BUSANB2BPOCTG
-- B2B 센터 입고 예정정보 , F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY , F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY , F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY
-- B2B 센터 재고 , F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY AS NAMSAAVQTY , F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY AS BUSANAVQTY , F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY AS ANSUNGAVQTY
-- B2B 일 평균 출고량 , F.NAMSAAVGOBQTY , F.BUSANAVGOBQTY , F.ANSUNGAVGOBQTY
-- B2B 센터 보장재고 , F.NAMSAB2BCTGRTDAYS * F.NAMSAAVGOBQTY AS NAMSAB2BCTGRTQTY , F.BUSANB2BCTGRTDAYS * F.BUSANAVGOBQTY AS BUSANB2BCTGRTQTY , F.ANSUNGB2BCTGRTDAYS * F.ANSUNGAVGOBQTY AS ANSUNGB2BCTGRTQTY
-- 발주 가용일 산정 , F.CTLEADTIME , F.AVDAYS
-- B2B센터 재고 + B2B입고예정정보 : B2B재고수량 -- 센터재고 : TO-BE : B2B재고수량 – (보장재고일수 * 오프라인일 평균수량 )) , F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY AS ANSUNGIVRFLCTNEEDQTYEA --안성 센터 재고(낱개) , F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY AS NAMSAIVRFLCTNEEDQTYEA --남사 센터 재고(낱개) , F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY AS BUSANIVRFLCTNEEDQTYEA --부산 센터 재고(낱개) -- INN , ROUND((F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICINN, 0),0) , 2) AS ANSUNGIVRFLCTNEEDQTYINN --안성 센터 재고(중포) , ROUND((F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICINN, 0),0) , 2) AS NAMSAIVRFLCTNEEDQTYINN --남사 센터 재고(중포) , ROUND((F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICINN, 0),0) , 2) AS BUSANIVRFLCTNEEDQTYINN --부산 센터 재고(중포) -- CTN , ROUND((F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) , 2) AS ANSUNGIVRFLCTNEEDQTYCTN --안성 센터 재고(CTN) , ROUND((F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) , 2) AS NAMSAIVRFLCTNEEDQTYCTN --남사 센터 재고(CTN) , ROUND((F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) , 2) AS BUSANIVRFLCTNEEDQTYCTN --부산 센터 재고(CTN) -- PLT , ROUND((F.ANSUNGAVQTY + F.ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ANSUNGCPP, 0),0), 2) AS ANSUNGIVRFLCTNEEDQTYPLT --안성 센터 재고(PLT) , ROUND((F.NAMSAAVQTY + F.NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(NAMSACPP, 0),0) , 2) AS NAMSAIVRFLCTNEEDQTYPLT --남사 센터 재고(PLT) , ROUND((F.BUSANAVQTY + F.BUSANIBEXPCTQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(BUSANCPP, 0),0) , 2) AS BUSANIVRFLCTNEEDQTYPLT --부산 센터 재고(PLT)
, COALESCE(ANSUNGCPP, 0) ANSUNGCPP -- 안성센터 CPP , COALESCE(NAMSACPP, 0) NAMSACPP -- 남사센터 CPP , COALESCE(BUSANCPP, 0) BUSANCPP -- 부산센터 CPP
-- 발주 요청 , F.REQORDERUNIT -- 발주단위 , F.DLVYREQORDERUNIT -- 배송용기단위 , F.REQORDERQTY -- 발주요청수량 , F.REQORDERTYPE , ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICINN, 0),0), 2) AS REQORDERINN , ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) , 2) AS REQORDERCTN , CASE WHEN F.REQCTKEY = '05' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ANSUNGCPP, 0),0), 2) WHEN F.REQCTKEY = '01' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(NAMSACPP, 0),0) , 2) WHEN F.REQCTKEY = '04' THEN ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(BUSANCPP, 0),0) , 2) ELSE ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCTN, 0),0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(ICCPP, 0),0) , 2) END AS REQORDERPLT , F.REQORDEREXCEPTYN -- 요청 CBM , F.REQCBM , F.REQPRC , F.VOL , F.SLPRC , F.OBFROMDAY AS AVGOBFROMDAY , F.OBTODAY AS AVGOBTODAY , F.APLYDAYS AS AVGAPLYDAYS , F.REQORDERUNITCTN , F.REQORDERUNITPLT , F.REQORDERUNITINN , F.NISYN , F.NISQTY , F.INSERTDATE , F.INSERTURKEY , F.UPDATEDATE , F.UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT RE.REQORDERSTATUS AS REQORDERSTATUS , COALESCE(RE.ABLEREQORDERYN, I.POABLEYN) AS ABLEREQORDERYN , 'Y' AS URGENCYREQORDERYN , COALESCE(RE.SEQ, -999) AS SEQ , I.OWKEY , IC.CTKEY , (SELECT CTNM FROM TORDER_MST_CT WHERE CTKEY = RE.REQCTKEY) AS CTNM -- 상품정보 , I.ICKEY , I.ICNM , I.UNICYN , CASE I.ASRTYN WHEN 'Y' THEN '아소트' ELSE '일반' END AS ASRTYN , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_EA, 1) AS ICEA , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_INN, 1) AS ICINN , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_CTN, 1) AS ICCTN , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_CPP, 1) AS ICCPP , COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_CTN, 1) * COALESCE(S_ICUT.IC_CPP, 1) AS ICPLT , IC.LCKEY -- 발주구역 , LC.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG , LC.NAMSAB2BPOCTG , LC.BUSANB2BPOCTG
, CASE WHEN B2B_REQORDER.NAMSA_IBEXPCTDAY >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') THEN B2B_REQORDER.NAMSA_IBEXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END AS NAMSAIBEXPCTQTY , CASE WHEN B2B_REQORDER.BUSAN_IBEXPCTDAY >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') THEN B2B_REQORDER.BUSAN_IBEXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END AS BUSANIBEXPCTQTY , CASE WHEN B2B_REQORDER.ANSUNG_IBEXPCTDAY >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') THEN B2B_REQORDER.ANSUNG_IBEXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END AS ANSUNGIBEXPCTQTY
-- B2B 센터 재고 , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.NAMSA_AVQTY, 0) AS NAMSAAVQTY , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.BUSAN_AVQTY, 0) AS BUSANAVQTY , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.ANSUNG_AVQTY, 0) AS ANSUNGAVQTY -- B2B 일 평균 출고량 , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.NAMSA_AVGOBQTY, 0) AS NAMSAAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.BUSAN_AVGOBQTY, 0) AS BUSANAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(B2B_REQORDER.ANSUNG_AVGOBQTY, 0) AS ANSUNGAVGOBQTY -- B2B 센터 보장재고 , COALESCE(GRTDAYS.NAMSA_B2BCTGRTDAYS, 1) AS NAMSAB2BCTGRTDAYS -- 남사 보장재고일수 , COALESCE(GRTDAYS.BUSAN_B2BCTGRTDAYS, 1) AS BUSANB2BCTGRTDAYS -- 부산 보장재고일수 , COALESCE(GRTDAYS.ANSUNG_B2BCTGRTDAYS, 1) AS ANSUNGB2BCTGRTDAYS -- 안성 보장재고일수 -- 발주 가용일 산정 , RE.REQCTKEY , COALESCE(RE.CTLEADTIME, CT.CTLEADTIME) AS CTLEADTIME , COALESCE(RE.AVDAYS, RO.NEEDDAYS) AS AVDAYS
-- 요청 CBM , ICUT.VOL * RE.REQORDERQTY AS REQCBM , I.SLPRC * RE.REQORDERQTY AS REQPRC , ICUT.VOL AS VOL , I.SLPRC AS SLPRC -- 로케이션 CAPA 정보 : 한번더 확인 필요
--발주요청 데이터 , RE.REQORDERUNIT -- 발주단위 , RE.DLVYREQORDERUNIT -- 배송용기단위 , RE.REQORDERQTY -- 발주요청수량 , RE.REQORDERDAY , RE.REQORDERAR , COALESCE(RE.REQORDERTYPE, COALESCE(RO.REQORDERTYPE, 03)) AS REQORDERTYPE -- 03 : 이고발주 , COALESCE(RE.REQORDEREXCEPTYN, 'N') AS REQORDEREXCEPTYN , COALESCE(B2C_OB.NISYN, 'N') AS NISYN , COALESCE(B2C_OB.NISQTY, 0) AS NISQTY , OBAVG.OBFROMDAY , OBAVG.OBTODAY , OBAVG.APLYDAYS , CNTRUNIT.REQORDERUNITCTN , CNTRUNIT.REQORDERUNITPLT , CNTRUNIT.REQORDERUNITINN , CTCPP.NAMSA_CPP AS NAMSACPP , CTCPP.BUSAN_CPP AS BUSANCPP , CTCPP.ANSUNG_CPP AS ANSUNGCPP , RE.INSERTDATE , RE.INSERTURKEY , RE.UPDATEDATE , RE.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_MST_IC I INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON I.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = ICUT.ICKEY AND ICUNITTYPE = 'EA' INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ICXCT IC ON I.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT CT ON IC.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY INNER JOIN ( SELECT ICKEY , OWKEY , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'EA' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 1) AS IC_EA , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'INN' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 1) AS IC_INN , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'CTN' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 1) AS IC_CTN , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'CTN' THEN CASE CPP WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE CPP END END), 1) AS IC_CPP FROM TORDER_MST_ICUTXTYPE WHERE OWKEY = 'DAISO' GROUP BY ICKEY, OWKEY ) S_ICUT ON I.OWKEY = S_ICUT.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = S_ICUT.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_REQORDER RO ON IC.OWKEY = RO.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = RO.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RO.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.ICKEY -- AVQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.AVQTY END) AS NAMSA_AVQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.AVQTY END) AS BUSAN_AVQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.AVQTY END) AS ANSUNG_AVQTY
-- PREIBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.PREIBQTY END) AS NAMSA_PREIBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.PREIBQTY END) AS BUSAN_PREIBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.PREIBQTY END) AS ANSUNG_PREIBQTY
-- IBEXPCTDAY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.IBEXPCTDAY END) AS NAMSA_IBEXPCTDAY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.IBEXPCTDAY END) AS BUSAN_IBEXPCTDAY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.IBEXPCTDAY END) AS ANSUNG_IBEXPCTDAY
-- IBEXPCTQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.IBEXPCTQTY END) AS NAMSA_IBEXPCTQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.IBEXPCTQTY END) AS BUSAN_IBEXPCTQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.IBEXPCTQTY END) AS ANSUNG_IBEXPCTQTY
-- AVGOBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN A.AVGOBQTY END) AS NAMSA_AVGOBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN A.AVGOBQTY END) AS BUSAN_AVGOBQTY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN A.AVGOBQTY END) AS ANSUNG_AVGOBQTY
FROM TORDER_INFO_B2BAVGOBQTY_REQORDER A INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY WHERE A.CRITDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY A.ICKEY ORDER BY A.ICKEY
) B2B_REQORDER ON I.ICKEY = B2B_REQORDER.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT #{CTKEY} AS CTKEY , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN GRTIVDAYS END) AS NAMSA_B2BCTGRTDAYS , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN GRTIVDAYS END) AS BUSAN_B2BCTGRTDAYS , MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN GRTIVDAYS END) AS ANSUNG_B2BCTGRTDAYS FROM TORDER_MST_CT A )GRTDAYS ON IC.CTKEY = GRTDAYS.CTKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY, SUM(COALESCE(EXPCTQTY, 0)) AS B2C_IB_QTY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT D ON H.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND H.SOHDKEY = D.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE O ON H.OWKEY = O.OWKEY AND H.ORDERTYPECD = O.ORDERTYPECD WHERE O.POCALINCYN = 'Y' AND H.DLVYEXPCTDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY ) B2C_IB ON IC.OWKEY = B2C_IB.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = B2C_IB.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY, D.URGENCYREQYN AS NISYN, SUM(D.NISQTY) AS NISQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT D ON H.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND H.SOHDKEY = D.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE O ON H.OWKEY = O.OWKEY AND H.ORDERTYPECD = O.ORDERTYPECD WHERE O.OBYN = 'Y' AND D.URGENCYREQYN = 'Y' AND D.URGENCYREQPRCSSEQ IS NULL AND H.DLVYEXPCTDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY H.OWKEY, D.ICKEY, D.URGENCYREQYN ) B2C_OB ON IC.OWKEY = B2C_OB.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = B2C_OB.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDERIV RIV ON IC.OWKEY = RIV.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = RIV.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RIV.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDER RE ON IC.OWKEY = RE.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = RE.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RE.ICKEY AND RE.REQORDERDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') AND RE.URGENCYREQORDERYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_LC LC ON IC.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND IC.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_OBAVGQTY OBAVG ON IC.OWKEY = OBAVG.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = OBAVG.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = OBAVG.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY , CTKEY , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN REQORDERUNIT = 'CTN' THEN CRITSET END), 0) AS REQORDERUNITCTN , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN REQORDERUNIT = 'PLT' THEN CRITSET END), 0) AS REQORDERUNITPLT , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN REQORDERUNIT = 'INN' THEN CRITSET END), 0) AS REQORDERUNITINN FROM TORDER_MST_REQORDER_CNTRUNIT WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY OWKEY, CTKEY ) CNTRUNIT ON IC.OWKEY = CNTRUNIT.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = CNTRUNIT.CTKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.ICKEY , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '01' THEN CPP END), 1) AS NAMSA_CPP , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '04' THEN CPP END), 1) AS BUSAN_CPP , COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN A.CTKEY = '05' THEN CPP END), 1) AS ANSUNG_CPP FROM TORDER_MST_ICXB2BCPP A GROUP BY A.ICKEY ) CTCPP ON IC.ICKEY = CTCPP.ICKEY WHERE I.POABLEYN = 'Y' AND RO.REQORDERTYPE = '03' AND I.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IC.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IC.ICKEY = #{ickey} ) F WHERE 1 = 1
